**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

CYG Zehui Intelligent Equipment (Guangdong) Co., Ltd. presents a clear case of corporate restructuring and strategic relocation. Originally established in Shanghai ('Shanghai Tesan Science & Technology') and formerly known as 'CYG Zehui Membrane Equipment (Zhuhai)', it now operates as a wholly-owned subsidiary (legal person sole proprietorship) within the 'CYG' (Changyuan Group) ecosystem, as evidenced by multiple '@cyg.com' email addresses. Despite its official industry classification as an 'Electric Vehicle Manufacturer', its operational footprint in Zhuhai (Room 203 in a high-tech park building), team size (9 employees), and explicit business scope confirm it is an asset-light R&D and engineering design node. It focuses on developing new energy equipment, smart manufacturing equipment, and electrical materials, acting as an innovation center for its parent group rather than a physical heavy-manufacturing EV assembly plant.
